results.name: cycle-block-grn-guildmage
results.description: The guildmage cycle from Guilds of Ravnica and Ravnica Allegiance. Each has two activated ability costing one of its colors plus {T}.

results.name: cycle-block-rav-guildmage
results.description: The guildmage cycle from the original Ravnica block. They have two activated abilities corresponding to each of their guild's colors.

results.name: cycle-block-rtr-guildmage
results.description: The guildmage cycle from Return to Ravnica block. Each has two activated abilities corresponding to both of the guild's colors.
